zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Sibyl de Tregoz於1271年出生在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德時，她的父親John de Tregoz II30歲，母親Mabel FitzWarin24歲。她於1285年之前與Sir William de Grandison I在英國薩默塞特多亞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1334年10月12日在英國賀福爾艾比 多雷享年63歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾艾比 多雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Sibyl de Tregoz于1271年出生在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德时，她的父亲John de Tregoz II30岁，母亲Mabel FitzWarin24岁。她于1285年之前与Sir William de Grandison I在英国薩默塞特多亞特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1334年10月12日在英国賀福爾艾比 多雷享年63岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾艾比 多雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tregoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from Treago in Crantock (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + uncertain final element.
Altered form of French   Tricot   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. It was reportedly brought to North America from England. Today it is found mainly in PA and OH. Compare   Trago  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Trago
meanings: Variant of   Trego  , a surname of Cornish and French origin. In the US, it is found mainly in PA and OH.

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Sibyl de Tregoz was born in 1271, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, her father, John de Tregoz II, was 30 and her mother, Mabel FitzWarin, was 24. She married Sir William de Grandison I before 1285, in Donyatt, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 12 October 1334, in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Sibyl de Tregoz est née en 1271, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Tregoz II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzWarin, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Grandison I avant 1285, à Donyatt, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1334, à Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Sibyl de Tregoz 1271 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Tregoz II 30 und ihre Mutter Mabel FitzWarin 24. Sie hat vor 1285 in Donyatt, Somerset, England Sir William de Grandison I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1334 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sibyl de Tregoz è nata il nel 1271 nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, John de Tregoz II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mabel FitzWarin, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Grandison I prima del 1285, nel Donyatt, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1334, nel Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Sibyl de Tregozが1271年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで生まれた時，父John de Tregoz IIは30歳，母Mabel FitzWarinは24歳であった。1285年以前にイギリスソメルセトドニーアットでSir William de Grandison Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1334年10月12日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアで63歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Sibyl de Tregoz(이)가 1271년 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Tregoz II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel FitzWarin(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1285년 이전 영국 서머세트 도니엇에서 Sir William de Grandison I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 10월 12일 영국 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sibyl de Tregoz nasceu em 1271, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Tregoz II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzWarin, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Grandison I antes 1285, em Donyatt, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1334, em Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Sibyl de Tregoz родилась в 1271 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Tregoz II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzWarin, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Grandison I перед 1285 г. в местности донятт, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 12 октября 1334 г. в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Sibyl de Tregoz nació en 1271, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Tregoz II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzWarin, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir William de Grandison I antes de 1285, en Donyatt, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1334, en Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
